author: alexmensch
description: Automatically sync tagged Markdown files to Cloudflare KV storage. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Alex Marshall
manifest.description: Automatically sync tagged Markdown files to Cloudflare KV storage.
manifest.name: Cloudflare KV Sync

name: Cloudflare KV Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Harden Cloudflare sync path — HTTP errors, URL encoding, batch resilience by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/54
* Fix sync-all race, auto-sync toggle, NaN delay; DRY + strict null checks by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/55
* Fix docs/UI drift + release workflow, bump 0.7.2 by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/56


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/compare/0.7.1...0.7.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Configured linting tools by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/1
* Bump js-yaml from 4.1.0 to 4.1.1 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/15
* Bump typescript from 5.9.2 to 5.9.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/3
* Bump @types/node from 24.3.0 to 24.9.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/13
* Initial code cleanup by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/16
* Bump esbuild from 0.25.9 to 0.25.11 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/12
* Update settings page by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/17
* Clean up existing logic by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/18
* Reworked sync logic for public release candidate by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/19
* Settings page updates by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/20
* Github release workflow by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/21
* Updated release workflow by @alexmensch in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/22

## New Contributors
* @alexmensch made their first contribution in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/1
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/pull/15

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alexmensch/obsidian-cloudflare-kv-sync/commits/0.4.0
